description: Catch and repair solution fit gaps when sales/SE design does not match actual customer use: oversell, undersell, or fine when it is not. Structure handoff so support is not the unpaid redesign team.

examples.context: Solution sold for light use. Production load much higher. Support held weekly vendor calls to keep service up.
examples.resolution: Capacity path corrected commercially. Vendor bridge became time-boxed with exit criteria.

examples.context: Account bought thin SKU. SE said fine. Missing features hit day two.
examples.resolution: Documented gap. Commercial add approved. Support stopped custom hacks.

examples.context: Pre-go-live fit gate found wrong auth model for customer ops.
examples.resolution: Design changed before cutover. No war room.
